states:
: ca[0] is equivalent to cai
    : ca[] are very small, so specify absolute tolerance
    : let it be ~1.5 - 2 orders of magnitude smaller than baseline level
    ca[Nannuli]       (mM) <1e-7>
    bufs[Nannuli]    (mM) <1e-3>
    cabufs[Nannuli]  (mM) <1e-7>
    bufm[Nannuli]    (mM) <1e-4>
    cabufm[Nannuli]  (mM) <1e-8>
    hc[Nannuli]
    ho[Nannuli]
	ip3i (mM) <1e-10>

frapion[NANN]	(mM) : frapion[0] is equivalent to frapioni
    frapionBuffer[NANN]  (mM)
    Buffer[NANN]    (mM)

mod.title: AMPA receptor (concentration-gated, 3-state)
states:
C          : closed (unbound)
    O          : open   (conducting)
    D          : desensitised

: ca[0] is equivalent to cai
    : ca[] are very small, so specify absolute tolerance
    : let it be ~1.5 - 2 orders of magnitude smaller than baseline level
    ca[Nannuli]       (mM) <1e-7>
    bufs[Nannuli]    (mM) <1e-3>
    cabufs[Nannuli]  (mM) <1e-7>
    bufm[Nannuli]    (mM) <1e-4>
    cabufm[Nannuli]  (mM) <1e-8>
    hc[Nannuli]
    ho[Nannuli]
	ip3i (mM) <1e-10>

frapion[NANN]	(mM) : frapion[0] is equivalent to frapioni
    frapionBuffer[NANN]  (mM)
    Buffer[NANN]    (mM)
